summary: Completed testing of Iteration 19 - DWZ56 Store Isolation & Public Storefront Features. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend storefront pages tested successfully including homepage, product listing, product detail, shopping cart, and store-specific routes.
critical_code_review_comments: DWZ56 tracking-list API correctly filters by store_name parameter for data isolation
DWZ56 import-stats API correctly filters by store_name parameter
DWZ56 purchase/tracking-list API correctly filters by store_name parameter
DWZ56 purchase/import-stats API correctly filters by store_name parameter
Storefront uses localStorage for cart persistence - works correctly within browser session
Store-specific routes (/store/{storeName}) correctly display store name in header
Cart shows order summary with subtotal, shipping, and total calculations
seed_data_creation: Used existing product ID 8568346706086 (NOVA Elite 65) from tnvcollection store
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 features fully tested. DWZ56 APIs now support store_name query parameter for data isolation across stores (tnvcollection, tnvcollectionpk, ashmiaa). Public storefront routes: /shop (homepage), /shop/products (listing), /shop/product/{id} (detail), /shop/cart (cart), /store/{storeName} (store-specific). Cart uses localStorage for persistence. Sample product ID: 8568346706086.

backend_apis.GET /api/dwz56/health: PASS - Returns status ok, configured true
backend_apis.GET /api/dwz56/tracking-list: PASS - Returns records with store isolation when store_name provided
backend_apis.GET /api/dwz56/import-stats: PASS - Returns stats with store isolation when store_name provided
backend_apis.POST /api/dwz56/purchase/tracking-list: PASS - Returns records with store isolation
backend_apis.GET /api/dwz56/purchase/import-stats: PASS - Returns stats with store isolation
backend_apis.GET /api/shopify/products: PASS - Returns products with store filter

frontend_ui.storefront_homepage: PASS - Hero section, categories, new arrivals, newsletter visible
frontend_ui.product_listing: PASS - 880 products, filters (Sort By, Price, Availability), grid/list view
frontend_ui.product_detail: PASS - Product info, size selector, add to bag, wishlist, features
frontend_ui.shopping_cart: PASS - Cart items, quantity controls, order summary, checkout button
frontend_ui.store_specific_routes: PASS - Store name displayed correctly in header
frontend_ui.cart_persistence: PASS - Cart data persists in localStorage across navigation

data_isolation_verified.dwz56_tracking_list: Verified - Records filtered by store_name parameter
data_isolation_verified.dwz56_import_stats: Verified - Stats filtered by store_name parameter
data_isolation_verified.dwz56_purchase_tracking_list: Verified - Records filtered by store_name parameter
data_isolation_verified.dwz56_purchase_import_stats: Verified - Stats filtered by store_name parameter
data_isolation_verified.shopify_products: Verified - Products filtered by store_name parameter
